title: Align provenance draft guard with ratified exportability contract + document the two-notion export contract
intent: Correct a stale governance test that asserted ProvenanceAttachmentDraft.is_exportable() is always false even for RATIFIED attachments, AND document the intentional two-notion export contract in the production model so the alignment is not mistaken for an inconsistency and 'reconciled' incorrectly later. Production code and the R2 governed-save wrapper already define RATIFIED as the only exportable provenance attachment status (is_exportable()), while export_authorized is a separate structural field that is always False and is not consulted by any export gate.
behavior_change: none - test correction plus docstring/comment-only clarification in provenance_attachment.py. No executable production behavior changes; is_exportable() still returns True exactly when status == RATIFIED and export_authorized remains always False.

diff_articulation.what_changed: (1) tests/governance/test_provenance_attachment_draft.py: split the stale RATIFIED exportability assertion into two focused invariants (non-ratified statuses in NON_EXPORTABLE_STATUSES remain non-exportable; a RATIFIED attachment returns is_exportable() True while export_authorized remains False), plus a contract-lock docstring on the divergence test and module docstring. (2) services/api/app/governance/provenance_attachment.py: docstring/comment-only clarification naming the intentional two-notion export contract — export_authorized is an always-False structural field (fail-closed guard + serialization/schema field, NOT an export gate), while is_exportable()/status==RATIFIED is the canonical gate the governed save boundary (app.util.ibg_dxf_export_lifecycle) consults. Also corrects the module-level 'Do NOT wire to DXF export' constraint, which was the R1 posture superseded by DO 79 / R2, and notes the type spans DRAFT->RATIFIED despite its historical 'Draft' name. No executable statements changed.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: The old test assertion contradicted services/api/app/governance/provenance_attachment.py::ProvenanceAttachmentDraft.is_exportable(), which returns True exactly when status == RATIFIED. Existing R2 export provenance tests (test_dxf_lifecycle_ibg_provenance_guards.py) rely on ratified attachments building a COMPAT_ONLY governed-save context. The added docstrings remove the standing contradiction between the class docstring ('draft structures do not wire to DXF export' / 'export_authorized ALWAYS False until ratification') and is_exportable(), which the review flagged as inviting an incompatible future 'cleanup'. This PR does not authorize blocked drafts or alter export_authorized; it repairs the stale test expectation and documents existing behavior.

commands_run: PYTHONPATH=services/api py -3.11 -m pytest tests/governance/test_provenance_attachment_draft.py services/api/tests/test_dxf_lifecycle_ibg_provenance_guards.py services/api/tests/test_ibg_export_provenance.py -q -> 29 passed, 3 existing NumPy reload warnings
PYTHONPATH=services/api py -3.11 -c import-and-construct RATIFIED draft -> is_exportable True, export_authorized False (behavior unchanged)
py -3.11 scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_gate.py --manifest .cbsp21/patch_input.json --changed-files <final PR file set> -> pass, 100% manifest coverage
py -3.11 -m app.ci.check_file_sizes (services/api) -> provenance_attachment.py ~348 lines, under 500 threshold
py -3.11 -m app.ci.check_complexity --baseline app/ci/complexity_baseline.json -> pass, no functions exceed complexity 15

files.intent: Docstring/comment-only: name the intentional two-notion export contract (always-False export_authorized field vs is_exportable()/status gate); correct the superseded R1 'do not wire to DXF export' note per DO 79 / R2; note DRAFT->RATIFIED lifecycle naming.
files.behavior_change: none - docstring/comment-only; no executable statements changed

files.intent: Align RATIFIED is_exportable() expectations with current production/R2 contract while preserving non-ratified non-exportability; add a contract-lock docstring for the intentional divergence.
files.behavior_change: none - test-only correction for existing behavior

files.intent: Declare the stale guard-test correction and the docstring-only production clarification for CBSP21 manifest gates.
